titleStmt.title: SII 26.575: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 575.

p.hi: Śaka 1711, Saumya, Mārgaśira śu. 15 = 1789 A.D., December 2 (Wednesday).

summary.p: It refers to the rule of Malrāju Guṁḍrāya and states that the temples of Gōpalasvāmi and Bhīmēsvarasvāmi at Jālakaṁṭi in Bellaṁkoṁḍa-sīma having been dilapidated and the worship therein being stopped for the past four years, Buchchanna, son of Rāmaṁnna, grandson of Rāgaṁnna of Pamggulūru belonging to Kākitela-gōtra and Kaṁma-vaṁśa, got them renovated and the deities reconsecrated therein, for the worship and offerings of which a gift of wet land with sowing capacity of 4 mānike and a quarter of wetland (velipsolamu) was made by Buchchanna, from out of the mānya lands bestowed on him by the king.

It also records the renovation and reconsecration of the temple of Vināyaka and the deity therein, renovation of the tank which was strengthened with bund and sluice and the exavation of a well nearby by the same donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1711
Agunēṭi saumyanāma saṁvatsara mā¨rgaśira
śu 15 lu . bellaṁkoṁḍḍa śīmalō jālakaṁṭi grā
ma (mā)na śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭi brahmāṁḍa nā
yakulayni gōpālasvāmi bhīmēśvara svā
mi vāri staḷālu reṁḍḍa pūjalēka nālgu
saṁvatsaramulu khilamai vuṁḍe ganaka
rājaśrī malrāju guṁḍārāyaniṁ
gāri prabhutvamulōnu kaṁmmavaṁśaju
layni kākitela gōtrōdbhavulunnu paṁggu
lūri rāgaṁnnagāri pautṛlunnu rāmaṁ
nnagāri putṛluṁnai yni buccannagāru
saṁprōkṣaṇa tirukalyāṇa mahōtsavakāla
maṁddu māku dhoravāru śalavu yicina
mānyapu polamulōnu ceri pātika veli po
lamunnu cerinālgu mānikela vittanāla va
ripolaṁ naivēdya dīpārādhanaku sama¨rpistimi
Idigāka vūri tū¨rppu ceruvu tegi
peddabhāvi mīdugā po¨rlli vināyaku
ḍu Ālayaṁ khilamāyanu nūtana śila vi
ghnēśvara pratiṣṭha cēstimi nūti pūḍiki tīyi
ṁcci ceruvugaṁḍi vēśi paikaṭṭa vēyiṁcci ka
luju kaṭṭiṁcci taṭākakūpa patiṣacēśi
vēyiṁcina dharmaśāśanaṁ yīkaiṁkaryaṁ Ācaṁ
drā¨rka stāyigānu koṁna vudhariṁccavavenū .
maṁggaḷa mahā śrīśrīśrīṁ jēyunū .
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ . paradattā pahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphala
ṁ bhavēttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.575 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
